name: Melgarejo (father, name unknown)
notes: Father of Sóstenes and Pascual Carlos Melgarejo y Velasco. Inferred from the compound surname: in 1917, 'Sóstenes y Pascual Carlos Melgarejo y Velasco' co-owned rancho La Alameda in Xalapa, Veracruz. 'y Velasco' indicates their mother's surname.

name: Velasco (mother, name unknown)
notes: Mother of Sóstenes and Pascual Carlos Melgarejo y Velasco. Surname inferred from 'Melgarejo y Velasco'.

name: Sostenes Gustavo Melgarejo y Velasco
notes: Husband of Rosa Martha González Ortiz. Father of Lusana Marina Melgarejo González. From Veracruz. Co-owned rancho 'La Alameda' in Xalapa, Veracruz, from 1917; the land was later used for Estadio Xalapeño. Source: Redalyc article on Estadio Xalapeño. Full name confirmed by Jewish Community of Lisbon certificate 111852/07-2022 for his daughter Lusana.

name: Pascual Carlos Melgarejo y Velasco
notes: Brother of Sostenes Gustavo Melgarejo y Velasco. Co-owner of rancho 'La Alameda' in Xalapa, Veracruz.

name: Inés González Ramírez
notes: Father of Esteban González Padilla. Rural family from Los Altos de Jalisco.

name: Felicitas Padilla Aceves
notes: Mother of Esteban González Padilla. Rural family from Los Altos de Jalisco.

name: Esteban González Padilla
notes: Born 26 Dec 1895 in Tepatitlán de Morelos, Jalisco. Founded Fábrica de Jabón La Corona in 1920 with brothers Loreto and Daniel. Married María Isabel Mendoza Pardo on 5 Jul 1918 in Guadalajara. Directed the company until 1950. Died 10 Sep 1971 in Mexico City.

name: Loreto González Padilla
notes: Brother of Esteban González Padilla. Co-founder of Fábrica de Jabón La Corona.

name: Daniel González Padilla
notes: Brother of Esteban González Padilla. Co-founder of Fábrica de Jabón La Corona.

name: María Isabel Mendoza Pardo
notes: Married Esteban González Padilla on 5 Jul 1918 in Guadalajara, Jalisco. Had four sons and six daughters.

name: Antonio González Mendoza
notes: Son of Esteban González Padilla and María Isabel Mendoza Pardo. Inherited leadership of Fábrica de Jabón La Corona in 1950.

name: González Mendoza (son, name unknown)
notes: One of the four sons of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: González Mendoza (son, name unknown)
notes: One of the four sons of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: González Mendoza (son, name unknown)
notes: One of the four sons of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: González Mendoza (daughter, name unknown)
notes: One of the six daughters of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: González Mendoza (daughter, name unknown)
notes: One of the six daughters of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: Rosa Martha González Ortiz
notes: Daughter of Esteban González Padilla and María Isabel Mendoza Pardo. Grandmother on the Melgarejo side. Married Sostenes Gustavo Melgarejo y Velasco. Mother of Lusana Marina Melgarejo González. One of six daughters.

name: González Mendoza (daughter, name unknown)
notes: One of the six daughters of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: González Mendoza (daughter, name unknown)
notes: One of the six daughters of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: González Mendoza (daughter, name unknown)
notes: One of the six daughters of Esteban and María Isabel.

name: Lusana Marina Melgarejo González
notes: Daughter of Rosa Martha González Ortiz and Sostenes Gustavo Melgarejo y Velasco. Mother of Daniel Martínez del Campo Melgarejo. Born 18 July 1968 in Distrito Federal, México. Certificate 111852/07-2022 from Comunidade Israelita de Lisboa certifies her as a descendant of Sephardic Jews of Portuguese origin.

name: Daniel Martínez del Campo Melgarejo
notes: Son of Lusana Marina Melgarejo González. Built this family tree app.
